contents:
Require Import
  HoTT.Classes.interfaces.naturals
  HoTT.Classes.interfaces.abstract_algebra
  HoTT.Classes.interfaces.orders
  HoTT.Classes.orders.nat_int
  HoTT.Classes.theory.integers
  HoTT.Classes.theory.rings
  HoTT.Classes.theory.groups
  HoTT.Classes.orders.rings.
Generalizable Variables N Z Zle Zlt R f.

Context `{Integers Z} `{Apart Z} `{!TrivialApart Z}
  `{!FullPseudoSemiRingOrder Zle Zlt} `{Naturals N}.

Lemma int_abs_unique (a b : IntAbs Z N) (z : Z) :
  int_abs Z N (ia:=a) z = int_abs Z N (ia:=b) z.

goals.conclusion: int_abs Z N z = int_abs Z N z
int_abs Z N z = int_abs Z N z

match int_abs_sig Z N z with
| inl s => s.1
| inr s => s.1
end = match int_abs_sig Z N z with
      | inl s => s.1
      | inr s => s.1
      end

contents:
destruct (int_abs_sig Z N (IntAbs:=a) z) as [[n1 E1]|[n1 E1]];
destruct (int_abs_sig Z N (IntAbs:=b) z) as [[n2 E2]|[n2 E2]].

goals.conclusion: naturals_to_semiring N Z n1 = naturals_to_semiring N Z n2
naturals_to_semiring N Z (n1 + n2) = naturals_to_semiring N Z 0
naturals_to_semiring N Z n1 + naturals_to_semiring N Z n2 = 0
naturals_to_semiring N Z (n1 + n2) = naturals_to_semiring N Z 0
naturals_to_semiring N Z n1 + naturals_to_semiring N Z n2 = 0
naturals_to_semiring N Z n1 = naturals_to_semiring N Z n2

contents:
Lemma int_abs_spec x :
  (0 ≤ x /\ f (int_abs Z N x) = x) |_| (x ≤ 0 /\ f (int_abs Z N x) = -x).

goals.conclusion: (0 ≤ x) * (f (int_abs Z N x) = x) + (x ≤ 0) * (f (int_abs Z N x) = - x)
(0 ≤ x) * (f (int_abs Z N x) = x) + (x ≤ 0) * (f (int_abs Z N x) = - x)

(0 ≤ x) *
(f match int_abs_sig Z N x with
   | inl s => s.1
   | inr s => s.1
   end = x) +
(x ≤ 0) *
(f match int_abs_sig Z N x with
   | inl s => s.1
   | inr s => s.1
   end = - x)

contents: destruct (int_abs_sig Z N x) as [[n E]|[n E]].

goals.conclusion: (0 ≤ naturals_to_semiring N Z n) * (f n = naturals_to_semiring N Z n)
f n = naturals_to_semiring N Z n
f n = naturals_to_semiring N Z n
f n = naturals_to_semiring N Z n

contents:
Lemma int_abs_sig_alt x :
  (sig (fun n : N => f n = x)) |_| (sig (fun n : N => f n = - x)).

goals.conclusion: {n : N & f n = x} + {n : N & f n = - x}
{n : N & f n = x} + {n : N & f n = - x}

contents:
Lemma int_abs_nat n :
  int_abs Z N (f n) = n.

goals.conclusion: f (int_abs Z N (f n)) = f n
f (int_abs Z N (f n)) = f n

hypotheses.type: f (int_abs Z N (f n)) = - f n

goals.conclusion: - f (int_abs Z N (f n)) = f n

hypotheses.type: f (int_abs Z N (f n)) = - f n
f (int_abs Z N (f n)) = - f n

contents:
Lemma int_abs_negate_nat n :
  int_abs Z N (-f n) = n.

goals.conclusion: int_abs Z N (- f n) = n
int_abs Z N (- f n) = n
f (int_abs Z N (- f n)) = f n
f (int_abs Z N (- f n)) = f n

hypotheses.type: f (int_abs Z N (- f n)) = - f n

goals.conclusion: f (int_abs Z N (- f n)) = f n

hypotheses.type: f (int_abs Z N (- f n)) = - - f n

goals.conclusion: f (int_abs Z N (- f n)) = f n

hypotheses.type: f (int_abs Z N (- f n)) = - f n

goals.conclusion: f n = f (int_abs Z N (- f n))

hypotheses.type: f (int_abs Z N (- f n)) = - f n

goals.conclusion: - f n = f (int_abs Z N (- f n))

hypotheses.type: f (int_abs Z N (- f n)) = - f n

goals.conclusion: f (int_abs Z N (- f n)) = f n

hypotheses.type: f (int_abs Z N (- f n)) = - - f n

goals.conclusion: f (int_abs Z N (- f n)) = f n

hypotheses.type: f (int_abs Z N (- f n)) = f n

contents:
Lemma int_abs_negate x :
  int_abs Z N (-x) = int_abs Z N x.

goals.conclusion: int_abs Z N (- x) = int_abs Z N x
int_abs Z N (- x) = int_abs Z N x
int_abs Z N (- x) = int_abs Z N x
int_abs Z N (- x) = int_abs Z N x
int_abs Z N (- x) = int_abs Z N x

contents: path_via (int_abs Z N (- f (int_abs Z N x))).

goals.conclusion: int_abs Z N (- f (int_abs Z N x)) = int_abs Z N x
int_abs Z N (- x) = int_abs Z N x
int_abs Z N (f (int_abs Z N x)) = int_abs Z N x

contents: Lemma int_abs_0_alt x : int_abs Z N x = 0 <-> x = 0.

destruct (int_abs_spec x) as [[_ E2]|[_ E2]];[|apply flip_negate_0];
  rewrite <-E2, E1, (preserves_0 (f:=f)); trivial.
Lemma int_abs_ne_0 x : int_abs Z N x <> 0 <-> x <> 0.

Lemma int_abs_nonneg x :
  0 ≤ x -> f (int_abs Z N x) = x.

goals.conclusion: 0 ≤ x -> f (int_abs Z N x) = x
0 ≤ x -> f (int_abs Z N x) = x

contents:
Lemma int_abs_nonpos x :
  x ≤ 0 -> f (int_abs Z N x) = -x.

goals.conclusion: x ≤ 0 -> f (int_abs Z N x) = - x
x ≤ 0 -> f (int_abs Z N x) = - x

contents:
Lemma int_abs_nonneg_plus x y :
  0 ≤ x -> 0 ≤ y -> int_abs Z N (x + y) = int_abs Z N x + int_abs Z N y.

goals.conclusion: 0 ≤ x -> 0 ≤ y -> int_abs Z N (x + y) = int_abs Z N x + int_abs Z N y
0 ≤ x -> 0 ≤ y -> int_abs Z N (x + y) = int_abs Z N x + int_abs Z N y
int_abs Z N (x + y) = int_abs Z N x + int_abs Z N y
f (int_abs Z N (x + y)) = f (int_abs Z N x + int_abs Z N y)

contents:
Lemma int_abs_mult x y :
  int_abs Z N (x * y) = int_abs Z N x * int_abs Z N y.

goals.conclusion: int_abs Z N (x * y) = int_abs Z N x * int_abs Z N y
int_abs Z N (x * y) = int_abs Z N x * int_abs Z N y
f (int_abs Z N (x * y)) = f (int_abs Z N x * int_abs Z N y)
f (int_abs Z N (x * y)) = f (int_abs Z N x) * f (int_abs Z N y)

contents:
destruct (int_abs_spec x) as [[? Ex]|[? Ex]],
   (int_abs_spec y) as [[? Ey]|[? Ey]]; rewrite Ex, Ey.

goals.conclusion: f (int_abs Z N (x * y)) = x * y
f (int_abs Z N (x * y)) = x * - y
f (int_abs Z N (x * y)) = - x * y
f (int_abs Z N (x * y)) = - x * - y
f (int_abs Z N (x * y)) = x * y
f (int_abs Z N (x * y)) = x * - y
f (int_abs Z N (x * y)) = - x * y
f (int_abs Z N (x * y)) = - x * - y
